description_long: This sculpture depicts a realistic human male head and neck rendered in a greenish, weathered bronze or similar metal, mounted atop a rectangular stone pedestal. The head features detailed facial features, wavy hair, and a slightly furrowed brow, with a lifelike expression. The patina on the metal gives it a blue-green coloration, suggesting exposure to the elements over time. The stone pedestal is light-colored, square in cross-section, and sits on a tiled base, with a visible plaque on the front. The overall presentation is formal and commemorative, typical of public monuments. The sculpture is designed to be viewed from all sides, with the front view offering the most direct engagement with the face.
description: A weathered bronze male head sculpture with detailed features, mounted on a square stone pedestal with a plaque, set on a tiled base.
description_view_0: Left profile of the male head sculpture, showing the textured hair and ear, with the stone pedestal and tiled base visible.
description_view_1: Frontal view of the sculpture, highlighting the facial features, expression, and the plaque on the pedestal.
description_view_2: Right profile of the head, displaying the contours of the face and hair, with the pedestal and base in view.
description_view_3: Rear view of the head, focusing on the back of the hair and neck, with the pedestal and base clearly visible.
attribute_location_context: Outdoor paved area, likely in a public or urban setting, as indicated by the tiled base and open surroundings.
